item.name: Magitek Avenger G1 Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your magitek avenger G1 will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Magitek Avenger G1
mount.action: Call into battle your magitek avenger G1, an imperial warmachina made gaudier by goblin hands.
mount.description: Rumor holds that a golden sasquatch statue stands at the heart of the Garlean capital, from which magitek weapons would emerge to defend the city should it fall under attack. The veracity of the tale aside, the goblins liked it enough that they decided to create this golden avenger to match the statue.
mount.tooltip:
I saw a golden opportunity
just begging to be seized...
- Tataru
